Tests and build scripts for various Pebble firmware services, including activity, analytics, Bluetooth, and more.

## Folders
- **[activity](activity/README.md)**: Activity tracking tests and data, Kraepelin algorithm tests, workout service tests, and build script.
- **[analytics](analytics/README.md)**: Tests for analytics event handling and heartbeat functionality, and a build script for analytics services.
- **[app_message](app_message/README.md)**: Tests for app message receiver, sender, and session capabilities, plus a build script for testing.
- **[blob_db](blob_db/README.md)**: Tests for various database operations in the Pebble firmware, including insertion, deletion, synchronization, and validation.
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth functionalities including BLE HRM, persistent storage, and local address management.
- **[comm_session](comm_session/README.md)**: Tests for communication session components in Pebble firmware, including kernel receiver, endpoints, and protocols.
- **[compositor](compositor/README.md)**: Tests for compositor functionality and build script for testing the compositor service.
- **[health](health/README.md)**: Tests and build script for the health service in Pebble firmware.
- **[notifications](notifications/README.md)**: Tests for ANCS filtering, notifications, utility functions, Nexmo SMS, notification storage, and build script.
- **[protobuf_log](protobuf_log/README.md)**: Helper functions, tests, and build script for protobuf log services in Pebble firmware.
- **[settings](settings/README.md)**: Tests for settings file functionality and build script for compiling and testing firmware services.
- **[timeline](timeline/README.md)**: Tests for alarm layout, attribute handling, calendar events, reminders, timeline layouts, models, peek events, and resources in Pebble firmware, plus a build script.

## Files
- **[test_accel_manager.c](test_accel_manager.c.md)**: Unit tests for the accelerometer manager in the Pebble firmware, including sampling rate validation and jitter-free sampling.
- **[test_analytics.c](test_analytics.c.md)**: Tests for analytics functionality, including stopwatch accuracy and minimal logging verification.
- **[test_app_cache.c](test_app_cache.c.md)**: Tests for the app cache functionality, including adding, removing, evicting, and purging orphaned files.
- **[test_app_fetch_endpoint.c](test_app_fetch_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the app fetch endpoint functionality in the Pebble firmware, including validation and error handling.
- **[test_app_file.c](test_app_file.c.md)**: Tests for app file name creation, validation, and app ID retrieval functions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_app_glance_service.c](test_app_glance_service.c.md)**: Tests for the app glance service, including scenarios with multiple and unsorted slices.
- **[test_app_install_manager.c](test_app_install_manager.c.md)**: Tests for the app installation manager in the Pebble firmware, including functions for app entry retrieval, watchface checks, and prioritization.
- **[test_app_menu_data_source.c](test_app_menu_data_source.c.md)**: Tests for the app menu data source in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, filtering, and order verification.
- **[test_audio_endpoint.c](test_audio_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the audio endpoint service, including data transfer, session control, and buffer overflow.
- **[test_clock.c](test_clock.c.md)**: Tests for clock functionality, including time setting, timezone handling, daylight saving time adjustments, and relative time calculations.
- **[test_compass_cal.c](test_compass_cal.c.md)**: Tests for compass calibration using sphere fitting with sample data and solution validation.
- **[test_contacts.c](test_contacts.c.md)**: Tests for contact management functionality in the Pebble firmware, including contact retrieval by UUID.
- **[test_cron.c](test_cron.c.md)**: Tests for the cron service in the Pebble firmware, including time changes and daylight saving time scenarios.
- **[test_debounced_connection_service.c](test_debounced_connection_service.c.md)**: Tests for the debounced connection service, simulating connection and disconnection events.
- **[test_do_not_disturb.c](test_do_not_disturb.c.md)**: Tests for the "Do Not Disturb" feature in the Pebble firmware, including manual, scheduled, and smart DND functionalities.
- **[test_evented_timer.c](test_evented_timer.c.md)**: Tests for the functionality of evented timers in the Pebble firmware, including registration, firing, and cancellation.
- **[test_hrm_manager.c](test_hrm_manager.c.md)**: Tests for the heart rate monitor manager in the Pebble firmware, including subscription handling, feature callbacks, and sensor enable/disable logic.
- **[test_light.c](test_light.c.md)**: Tests for backlight functionality, including button interactions and light enablement scenarios.
- **[test_migrate_wakeup.c](test_migrate_wakeup.c.md)**: Tests for migrating wakeup entries from version 1 to version 2 in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_music_endpoint.c](test_music_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the music endpoint in the Pebble firmware, including handling of app events, message reception, and command sending.
- **[test_pfs.c](test_pfs.c.md)**: Tests for the PFS (Pebble File System) service, including file operations, garbage collection, and error handling.
- **[test_phone_call.c](test_phone_call.c.md)**: Tests for phone call handling in the Pebble firmware, including incoming, outgoing, and missed call scenarios.
- **[test_phone_pp.c](test_phone_pp.c.md)**: Tests for phone protocol message handling and event assertions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_put_bytes.c](test_put_bytes.c.md)**: Tests for the `put_bytes` functionality in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, message handling, and timeout scenarios.
- **[test_registry_endpoint.c](test_registry_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the registry endpoint in the Pebble firmware, including message handling and response validation.
- **[test_shared_prf_storage_v2.c](test_shared_prf_storage_v2.c.md)**: Tests for shared profile storage functionality, including BLE and BT Classic pairing data management.
- **[test_shared_prf_storage_v3.c](test_shared_prf_storage_v3.c.md)**: Tests for shared profile storage version 3, including initialization, data storage, and data integrity checks.
- **[test_smartstrap_comms.c](test_smartstrap_comms.c.md)**: Tests for smartstrap communication functionality, including data sending, receiving, and handling bus contention.
- **[test_timeline_item.c](test_timeline_item.c.md)**: Tests for timeline item functionality, including serialization, deserialization, and action retrieval.
- **[test_timezone_database.c](test_timezone_database.c.md)**: Tests for timezone database functions, including region lookup, DST rules, and region information loading.
- **[test_touch.c](test_touch.c.md)**: Tests for touch event handling in the Pebble firmware, including touch down, lift off, position updates, and error handling.
- **[test_transcription.c](test_transcription.c.md)**: Tests for transcription validation and iteration functions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_transcription_example.h](test_transcription_example.h.md)**: Defines a static array for testing transcription data with sentence and word details.
- **[test_vibe.c](test_vibe.c.md)**: Unit tests for vibration patterns and history in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_vibe_intensity.c](test_vibe_intensity.c.md)**: Tests for the vibe intensity functionality, including string conversion and cycling through intensities.
- **[test_vibe_score.c](test_vibe_score.c.md)**: Unit tests for the VibeScore functionality in the Pebble firmware, including pattern and delay handling.
- **[test_vibe_score_info.c](test_vibe_score_info.c.md)**: Unit tests for the `vibe_score_info` service, verifying resource ID retrieval, name retrieval, score cycling, and score validity.
- **[test_voice_endpoint.c](test_voice_endpoint.c.md)**: Tests for the voice endpoint service, including session setup, dictation, and NLP result handling.
- **[test_wakeup.c](test_wakeup.c.md)**: Tests for the wakeup service in the Pebble firmware, including scheduling, cancellation, and handling time changes.
- **[test_weather_service.c](test_weather_service.c.md)**: Tests for the weather service in the Pebble firmware, including initialization and forecast retrieval.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for the Pebble firmware tests, specifying source files, test files, and build configurations.
